context.title: Loadings Plot
context.description: In the Loading Plot, the data points represent the Features and their position explains the influence on the Sample Scores.

context.title: Score Plot
context.description: In the Score Plot, the data points represent the Samples. Their position explain the similarity to other Samples according to the respective components.

context.title: S Plot
context.description: In the S Plot, the data points represent the Features. Their position is defined by predictive covariance p and predictive correlation p(corr) from the OPLS model.
